assertions.title: Enter Package screen renders with package input, QR button, password field, begin button

steps.action: Navigate to Welcome and click Onboard

steps.expected: Package textarea, Scan QR button, Package Password field, Begin Onboarding button, and Back link are present
steps.observed: All expected controls rendered; Begin Onboarding initially disabled until valid package

evidence.network: No API calls observed; local Vite asset GET requests loaded successfully

assertions.title: Handshake screen renders with vertical timeline showing progress states

steps.action: Enter valid package/password and click Begin Onboarding

steps.expected: Timeline includes done/in-progress/pending states, summary bar, and Cancel Onboarding button
steps.observed: All three timeline states visible with summary bar and Cancel Onboarding button

evidence.network: No API calls observed; route transition handled client-side

assertions.title: Onboarding Failed renders with warning styling, timeout message, retry and back buttons

steps.action: From handshake, trigger failure path and wait for transition

steps.expected: Amber warning alert with timeout title/description plus Retry and Back to Onboarding buttons
steps.observed: Warning alert titled 'Onboarding Timed Out' and both recovery buttons rendered

assertions.title: Onboarding Complete renders with Group/Device Profile review cards, password fields, save button

steps.expected: Success indicator, Group Profile card, Device Profile card, password + confirm fields, Save & Launch Signer button, and no Back link
steps.observed: All expected cards/fields/button present and no Back control visible

assertions.title: Full Onboard happy path navigable (Welcome → Enter → Handshake → Complete → Dashboard)

steps.action: Follow happy path from Welcome through Enter Package and Handshake

evidence.network: No API calls observed; local static asset GET requests only

assertions.title: Onboard failure path navigable (Welcome → Enter → Handshake → Failed, with retry)

steps.action: Click Back to Onboarding on failed screen

assertions.title: Full Onboard-to-Dashboard flow works end-to-end

steps.action: Run full onboard path from Welcome through Complete
steps.expected: Reach dashboard after Save & Launch Signer (or return to welcome with onboarded profile visible)
steps.observed: Flow reached /onboard/complete, but Save & Launch Signer navigated to / with first-time Welcome state and no onboarded profile row

evidence.network: No API calls observed; local assets served by Vite

assertions.issues: Onboarding completion does not land on dashboard and does not show an onboarded returning-profile state on Welcome.

evidence.network: Client-side redirects; no API calls observed

frictions.description: Triggering the timeout/failure path required using a hidden 'Simulate Failure' control on the Handshake screen.
frictions.resolution: Used the Simulate Failure button to deterministically reach /onboard/failed and validate retry/back recovery actions.
